targets.rawSql: SELECT extreme_score::float8 AS "EPZ Score" FROM epz_scores ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT score::float8 AS "Score" FROM signal_log ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(taker_sell_vol_icp / NULLIF(taker_buy_vol_icp + taker_sell_vol_icp, 0) * 100, 0)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM liquidation_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(mandatory_sell_icp) FROM np_threshold_daily WHERE ts::date = CURRENT_DATE), 0) AS value
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM wallet_movements WHERE from_principal LIKE 'bef91947%' AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'

SELECT
  (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts) * 1000)::bigint AS ts_ms,
  price::float,
  quantity_icp::float                      AS qty,
  (is_buyer_maker::int)                    AS bm
FROM spot_trades
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY ts ASC, agg_trade_id ASC

SELECT
  (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM wm.ts) * 1000)::bigint AS ts_ms,
  wm.amount_icp::float                        AS amount
FROM wallet_movements wm
WHERE wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND wm.hop_depth = 0
  AND (
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM np_wallet_labels
      WHERE account_id = wm.to_principal
        AND label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
    )
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM wallet_movements wm_h
      JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
      WHERE wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal
        AND wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
    )
  )
ORDER BY wm.ts ASC

SELECT
  (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts) * 1000)::bigint AS ts_ms,
  CASE WHEN prev_rate < 0 AND funding_rate >= 0 THEN 'bullish'
       WHEN prev_rate > 0 AND funding_rate < 0 THEN 'bearish'
  END AS flip_type
FROM (
  SELECT ts, funding_rate,
    LAG(funding_rate) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev_rate
  FROM funding_rates
  WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND exchange = 'binance'
) sub
WHERE (prev_rate < 0 AND funding_rate >= 0)
   OR (prev_rate > 0 AND funding_rate < 0)
ORDER BY ts ASC

WITH window_changes AS (
  SELECT ts, regime,
    LAG(regime) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS prev_regime
  FROM signal_log
  WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
),
before_window AS (
  SELECT ts, regime FROM signal_log
  WHERE ts < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts) * 1000)::bigint AS ts_ms, regime
FROM (
  SELECT ts, regime FROM before_window
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ts, regime FROM window_changes
  WHERE regime != prev_regime OR prev_regime IS NULL
) combined
ORDER BY ts_ms ASC

SELECT
  (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts) * 1000)::bigint AS ts_ms,
  price::float,
  quantity_icp::float AS qty
FROM spot_trades
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND is_buyer_maker = true
  AND quantity_icp > 6000
ORDER BY ts ASC, agg_trade_id ASC

SELECT
  (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts) * 1000)::bigint AS ts_ms,
  price::float,
  quantity_icp::float                      AS qty,
  (is_buyer_maker::int)                    AS bm
FROM spot_trades
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY ts ASC, agg_trade_id ASC

WITH minute_data AS (SELECT date_trunc('minute', o.ts) AS time, ROUND(AVG(o.ask_depth_icp)::numeric, 0) AS ask_depth, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(s.quantity_icp)::numeric, 0), 0) AS spot_vol FROM ob_snapshots o LEFT JOIN spot_trades s ON date_trunc('minute', s.ts) = date_trunc('minute', o.ts) WHERE o.ts >= $__timeFrom() AND o.ts <= $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1), with_signal AS (SELECT time, ask_depth, spot_vol, LAG(ask_depth) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS prev_ask, AVG(spot_vol) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_vol FROM minute_data) SELECT time, ask_depth AS "Ask Tiefe (ICP)", spot_vol AS "Spot Vol (ICP)", CASE WHEN prev_ask IS NOT NULL AND ABS(ask_depth - prev_ask) / NULLIF(prev_ask, 0) < 0.05 AND spot_vol > GREATEST(avg_vol * 1.5, 100) THEN ask_depth ELSE NULL END AS "Iceberg ⚠" FROM with_signal ORDER BY time

SELECT
  to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch FROM ts) / 900) * 900) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(taker_sell_vol_icp / NULLIF(taker_buy_vol_icp + taker_sell_vol_icp, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Sell-Ratio %",
  ROUND(AVG(open_interest_icp)::numeric, 0) AS "Long OI (ICP)",
  20.0 AS "Sell-Floor 20%"
FROM liquidation_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS "time",
  SUM(quantity_icp)::float8 AS "Long Liq (ICP)"
FROM liquidation_events
WHERE side = 'long' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS "time",
  SUM(quantity_icp)::float8 AS "Short Liq (ICP)"
FROM liquidation_events
WHERE side = 'short' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  (funding_rate * 100)::float AS "Binance FR (%)"
FROM funding_rates
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND exchange = 'binance'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  CASE WHEN sign(funding_rate) != LAG(sign(funding_rate)) OVER (ORDER BY ts)
       THEN 0.0 ELSE NULL END AS "FR Flip"
FROM funding_rates
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND exchange = 'binance'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  (funding_rate * 100)::float AS "HL FR (%)"
FROM funding_rates
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND exchange = 'hl'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  oi_icp::float8 AS "OI Binance (ICP)",
  (SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.20) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY oi_icp)
   FROM open_interest
   WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
     AND exchange = 'binance')::float8 AS "Flush Zone (P20 30T)"
FROM open_interest
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND exchange = 'binance'
ORDER BY ts

WITH delta AS (
  SELECT ts,
    (oi_icp - LAG(oi_icp) OVER (ORDER BY ts))::float8 AS d
  FROM open_interest
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
    AND exchange = 'binance'
)
SELECT ts AS "time", CASE WHEN d > 0 THEN d ELSE NULL END AS "OI Delta +" FROM delta ORDER BY ts

WITH delta AS (
  SELECT ts,
    (oi_icp - LAG(oi_icp) OVER (ORDER BY ts))::float8 AS d
  FROM open_interest
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
    AND exchange = 'binance'
)
SELECT ts AS "time", CASE WHEN d < 0 THEN d ELSE NULL END AS "OI Delta -" FROM delta ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  oi_icp::float8 AS "OI HL (ICP)"
FROM open_interest
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND exchange = 'hl'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time, extreme_score AS "EPZ Score", 76 AS "Schwellenwert"
FROM epz_scores WHERE ts >= $__timeFrom() AND ts <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts

WITH sl AS (
  SELECT trigger_mint, trigger_wallet, trigger_ob_thin, trigger_threshold, details
  FROM signal_log ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT trigger_name AS "Trigger", schwelle AS "Schwelle",
  ROUND(wert::numeric, 2) AS "Ist-Wert", aktiv::int AS "Status"
FROM (
  SELECT '① Minting Event' AS trigger_name, '> 0 (48h)' AS schwelle,
    COUNT(*)::numeric AS wert, (COUNT(*) > 0) AS aktiv
  FROM wallet_movements WHERE hop_depth=0 AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '48h'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '② Wallet Hop 0', '> 0 (6h)', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) > 0
  FROM wallet_movements WHERE hop_depth=0 AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '6h'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '③ Aggregator aktiv', '> 0 (6h)',
    ((sl.details->>'trigger_aggregator')::boolean)::int::numeric,
    (sl.details->>'trigger_aggregator')::boolean
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '④ OB Bid Depth', '< 50.000 ICP',
    (SELECT ROUND(bid_depth_icp::numeric,0) FROM ob_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1),
    (SELECT bid_depth_icp FROM ob_snapshots ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) < 50000
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑤ L/S Ratio', '> 5,0',
    ROUND((sl.details->>'ls_ratio')::numeric, 3),
    (sl.details->>'ls_ratio')::numeric > 5
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑥ Perp/Spot Ratio', '> 3,0',
    ROUND((sl.details->>'perp_spot')::numeric, 3),
    (sl.details->>'perp_spot')::numeric > 3
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑦ Sell-Ratio > 75%', '> 75%',
    ROUND((sl.details->>'sell_ratio_pct')::numeric, 1),
    sl.trigger_threshold
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑧ Hop-2/3-Spike', 'Spike > 1.5×',
    ((sl.details->>'trigger_hop_spike')::boolean)::int::numeric,
    (sl.details->>'trigger_hop_spike')::boolean
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑨ CVD-Divergenz', 'Preis↑/CVD↓',
    ROUND((sl.details->>'cvd_price_chg_pct')::numeric, 2),
    (sl.details->>'trigger_cvd_div')::boolean
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑩ Large Ask Sell', '≥3×>6k/30min',
    ((sl.details->>'trigger_large_sell')::boolean)::int::numeric,
    (sl.details->>'trigger_large_sell')::boolean
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑪ Funding Spike', '> 0.0005',
    ROUND(ABS((sl.details->>'funding_rate_pct')::numeric), 4),
    (sl.details->>'trigger_funding_spike')::boolean
  FROM sl
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '⑫ Liq-Sweep (Long>5×Short)', '> 5× (1h)',
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT SUM(quantity_icp) FILTER (WHERE side='long') / NULLIF(SUM(quantity_icp) FILTER (WHERE side='short'), 0)
       FROM liquidation_events WHERE ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '1h'),
      0
    )::numeric,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT SUM(quantity_icp) FILTER (WHERE side='long') / NULLIF(SUM(quantity_icp) FILTER (WHERE side='short'), 0)
       FROM liquidation_events WHERE ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '1h'),
      0
    ) > 5
) sub
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  'Hop ' || hop_depth::text AS hop,
  ROUND(SUM(amount_icp))::float8 AS icp
FROM wallet_movements
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 days'
  AND amount_icp > 100
GROUP BY hop_depth
ORDER BY hop_depth ASC

panels.title: NP Wallet Bewegungen — letzte 10 Tage (>100 ICP)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (s_taker    * 0.32)::float8 AS "Taker Sell (32%)",
  (s_momentum * 0.23)::float8 AS "Momentum (23%)",
  (s_delta    * 0.20)::float8 AS "Price Drop (20%)",
  (s_oi       * 0.15)::float8 AS "OI Change (15%)",
  (s_ls       * 0.10)::float8 AS "L/S Shift (10%)"
FROM epz_scores ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT sell_price_corr FROM summary_stats ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT oi_price_corr FROM summary_stats ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT best_lag_hours FROM summary_stats ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signal_log WHERE score >= 4 AND ts >= NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days'), 0) AS value

panels.description: Durchschnittliche Block-Failure-Rate pro Node-Provider. Hohe Werte = schlechte Performance = geringere Rewards.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    COALESCE(np.name, SUBSTRING(perf.provider_principal, 1, 20) || '…') AS "Node Provider",
    perf.provider_principal AS principal,
    COUNT(DISTINCT perf.node_id) AS "Nodes",
    AVG(perf.failure_rate_pct)::float8 AS "Failure-Rate %"
FROM np_performance perf
LEFT JOIN np_providers np ON np.principal = perf.provider_principal
WHERE perf.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '35 days'
  AND perf.failure_rate_pct IS NOT NULL
  AND perf.failure_rate_pct > 0
GROUP BY perf.provider_principal, np.name
ORDER BY "Failure-Rate %" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 20 NPs: Failure-Rate (letzte 35 Tage)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts) AS time,
  COALESCE(SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE wl_d.label IN ('exchange','aggregator') OR wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
  ), 0)::float8 AS "Exchange / Aggregator",
  COALESCE(SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE (wl_d.label IS NULL OR wl_d.label NOT IN ('exchange','aggregator'))
        AND (wl_h.label IS NULL OR wl_h.label NOT IN ('exchange','aggregator'))
  ), 0)::float8 AS "Unbekannt / Staking"
FROM wallet_movements wm
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_d ON wl_d.account_id = wm.to_principal
LEFT JOIN wallet_movements wm_h ON wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal AND wm_h.hop_depth = 1
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0 AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts)
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Größte Empfänger ohne Exchange-Label. ICP Dashboard aufrufen und als Exchange/Aggregator/Staking klassifizieren.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wm.to_principal AS "Account ID",
  COUNT(DISTINCT np.principal) AS "NPs",
  ROUND(SUM(wm.amount_icp)::numeric, 0)::float8 AS "ICP"
FROM wallet_movements wm
JOIN np_providers np ON np.principal = wm.from_principal
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl ON wl.account_id = wm.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0
  AND (wl.principal IS NULL OR wl.label = 'unknown')
  AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '35 days'
GROUP BY wm.to_principal
ORDER BY "ICP" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Destinations — unbekannte Empfänger (manuell verifizieren)

panels.description: Principals die von ≥5 NPs Transfers empfangen haben. Verifizieren und in exchange_whitelist.json eintragen.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wm.to_principal AS "Account ID",
  COUNT(DISTINCT np.principal) AS "NPs",
  ROUND(SUM(wm.amount_icp)::numeric, 0)::float8 AS "ICP",
  COALESCE(wl.label, '—') AS "Label"
FROM wallet_movements wm
JOIN np_providers np ON np.principal = wm.from_principal
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl ON wl.account_id = wm.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0
GROUP BY wm.to_principal, wl.label
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT np.principal) >= 3
ORDER BY "NPs" DESC, "ICP" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Aggregator-Kandidaten (auto-erkannt)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts) AS time,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(wm.amount_icp) FILTER (
      WHERE wl_d.label IN ('exchange','aggregator') OR wl_h.label IN ('exchange','aggregator')
  ) / NULLIF(SUM(wm.amount_icp), 0), 1)::float8 AS "Exchange-Flow %"
FROM wallet_movements wm
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_d ON wl_d.account_id = wm.to_principal
LEFT JOIN wallet_movements wm_h ON wm_h.from_principal = wm.to_principal AND wm_h.hop_depth = 1
LEFT JOIN np_wallet_labels wl_h ON wl_h.account_id = wm_h.to_principal
WHERE wm.hop_depth = 0 AND wm.ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', wm.ts)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  ts AS "time",
  MAX(CASE WHEN exchange = 'hl'      THEN predicted_rate * 100 END) AS "HL",
  MAX(CASE WHEN exchange = 'binance' THEN predicted_rate * 100 END) AS "Binance",
  MAX(CASE WHEN exchange = 'bybit'   THEN predicted_rate * 100 END) AS "Bybit"
FROM predicted_fundings
WHERE asset = 'ICP'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY ts
ORDER BY ts

SELECT NOW() AS "time",
  predicted_rate * 100 AS "Predicted FR"
FROM predicted_fundings
WHERE asset = 'ICP' AND exchange = 'hl'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT NOW() AS "time",
  predicted_rate * 100 AS "Predicted FR"
FROM predicted_fundings
WHERE asset = 'ICP' AND exchange = 'binance'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT NOW() AS "time",
  predicted_rate * 100 AS "Predicted FR"
FROM predicted_fundings
WHERE asset = 'ICP' AND exchange = 'bybit'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT NOW() AS "time",
  ABS(
    MAX(CASE WHEN exchange = 'hl'      THEN predicted_rate END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN exchange = 'binance' THEN predicted_rate END)
  ) * 100 AS "HL/Bin Spread"
FROM predicted_fundings
WHERE asset = 'ICP'
  AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
